General.Name: Carbios
General.Description: Carbios SAS, engages in design and development of enzymatic processes in France. The company is also involved in enzymatic recycling and biodegradation activities. It exports its products. Carbios SAS was incorporated in 2011 and is headquartered in Clermont-Ferrand, France.

3.Name: Ms. Sophie  Balmary
3.Title: Chief People, Legal Affairs & Communication Officer
